parameters.content: Sanitized portfolio demo. Customer emails are not sent directly. The workflow prepares reminder drafts in reminders_queue, routes risky cases to manager review, and keeps credential IDs as CRED_ID placeholders.

main.node: Restore review context after status log
Restore standard context after status log

meta.notes: Credential IDs, sheet IDs, email API keys, chat IDs, and private values are placeholders. Reconnect credentials manually before testing.
